review_title: An Excellent All-In-One CRM and EDM Platform
author: Duncan C.
pros: Freshsales consolidates virtually every CRM and EDM function that my business needs. I've discontinued my Mailchimp and Zoho subscriptions as a result, and will probably continue cancelling some of my other subscriptions as Freshsales adds more features. The ease of use, capabilities, and value for money are, overall, excellent. I mostly use Freshsales for contact management, collecting self-reported attribution, and email marketing.
cons: As with many feature-dense products, there are some parts that are more polished/easier to use than others. I had a fair bit of trouble setting up certain automations, which was made more difficult because a lot of the documentation was out of date (I was saved by Freshworks' excellent support). I also had some trouble setting up self-reported attribution the way I wanted.

review_title: Best high end software for sales manager and their team working in startups
description: There are many alternative sales tools out there but freshsales helped me in my initial days of lead generation, hence I will recommend this tool to those who have just started into marketing & sales department.
author: Devyani S.
pros: I was using this software for 1 and half year, I started with just live real-time chat service and now I have started using its premium features to manage my leads and sending them sales pitch and updates with easy campaign manager. I loved the user interface which takes no brains to understand the features that you need to solve your purpose. I have used their reporting tools that helps me make decisions based on results I have got from campaigns.
cons: I would love this tool if they provide integration with social networks too like Instagram and Facebook messages along with LinkedIn. Currently they have limited integration modules. Also importing files takes much time then managing and sending them sometimes it got stuck and I need to reiterate everything again.

review_title: Freshsales. Fresh start.
description: This was our company's first CRM. We still enjoy Freshsales, but often find quirks and areas for improvement that we sent to our representative. There have been advancements since we started with Fresh, but would love to know more insight on what's to come in the next year and three-year plan, so we can prepare and know how the system will improve over time.
author: Tori S.
pros: Up front, nothing seems overcomplicated. It has the essentials we need to track business on the sales side. Those who tend to support tickets are quite helpful. Happy with the timely, honest support we receive!
cons: As with any system, there are areas of improvement, wishes for changes, and improvements we would love to see implemented. I wish there were more transparent check-ins telling us upcoming changes that are being worked on in the background. I also wish we were notified when updates were going to run so that could better prepare when "Blackout" periods are going to take place during the workday.

review_title: Best Features of Freshsales CRM
description: Global Compliance requirement as such that of GDPR & Other relevant regulation with regards to DATA Management & security.
author: Yogesh M.
pros: Phone system & O365 Email Integration & reporting features.
cons: Unable to configure Phone system in other VOIP Devices like IP Phone & Polycom Conference Devices. Linking of Deals with Emails

review_title: Good sales and marketing CRM
description: It's fine overall but earlier support was good and now it's difficult to get a hold of rep.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's comprehensive as this has functionalities for both sales and marketing. This also has freshchat feature which we are using on our website.
cons: The support is not good and on the other hand they have made a newer version of it and it took 6 months to migrate us to newer version for the older one.

review_title: Great CRM Platform for Startups and Growing Businesses
description: Aside from the onboarding process, we enjoy using Freshsales and believe it's worth it to manage your contacts and leads. Freshsales is a great platform to use with any sales pipeline.
author: Jose J G.
pros: When I started using Freshsales with my team, we get amazed with the simplicity of the CRM and the flexibility of features and options with each contact. Also, we enjoyed the integration with Freshdesk support and assistance platform.
cons: The onboarding was a little bit long, it took around 3 days, even though we started with a few contacts by then. I hope they improve the onboarding time or change the methodology to enroll using Freshsales.

review_title: The CRM Freshsales is useful and adaptable
description: Managing your leads, prospects, deals, wins/losses, and clients is a breeze. It allows you to keep tabs on your emails and see when you were last in touch. When dealing with thousands of leads, this is a great way to keep everything straight and organized.
author: Rachel M.
pros: I like how simple it is to narrow down potential customers. I appreciate the convenience of being able to draft contracts for clients and have them sign them electronically. Having access to pre-made email templates, mass emailing, and detailed stats is also fantastic.
cons: The strict structure of Freshsales sometimes gets on my nerves. It's both helpful and confusing that there are so many filters to choose from. It can be a lot to take in at once.

review_title: A comprehensive and very effective Marketing tool - not more
description: We have used it to conduct marketing campaigns and measure customer responses and interactions. It has proven to be a very effective online marketing tool with automations. At the same time, it is not for sales-intensive approaches and complex business models that do not have linear processes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Marketing automation helped a lot when executing a campaign with multiple scenarios and steps. Excellent capability. 2. The Landing page capability is very good, allowing you to integrate interaction data directly without going for website add-ons or plugins. It has good quality templates as well
cons: 1. The sales management process is weak and does not offer you the capability to distinguish potential customers/leads that can be revisited. It is more focused on qualified cases/deals that can be won in a series of steps. 2. The email interaction (at least with Gmail) does not work. Most of the relevant emails appeared late in the CRM. You have to refresh every x mins manually to get the latest emails, which does not help. You end up going with the Gmail front-end in order to avoid missing incoming messages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Could be so much better, sadly a waste of time
description: Frustrating and disappointing. It has potential, but there is a lost leader there somewhere..
author: James N.
pros: Easy set up, intuitive interface, good gmail integration, decent price. I once called them for help on a saturday and someone answered and was very helpful. (read our cons however)
cons: Customer service and account support are terrible- email and ticket support queries never get resolved. Horribly time consuming, contacted by 4-5 different representatives, each one not familiar with the problem. We tried their trial twice as we thought giving it a second chance might have a different outcome. Wrong. The integration with Freshcaller didn't work and they couldnt fix it. Frustrating experience. We decided to go back to the simplest CRM's possible with the best customer service for half this price.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best CRM tool for newcomers.
description: Freshsales is the best CRM software for beginners, it has not so many features but it helps when figuring out what CRM software is. The intuitive aspect of the software helps a lot.
author: Andrei P.
pros: Freshsales is very intuitive and easy to learn.
cons: It may lack some advanced features for more experienced users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Creates unrivalled efficiency for the team.
description: As previously mentioned, genuinely outstanding.
author: Kharn D.
pros: Outstanding software. Having everything needed in place, all lead tracking, lead generation, marketing and calls, really does the 360 feel freshworks are aiming towards. Customer support is unrivalled across all other software we have used previously. I would go as far as saying it’s better than any software or saas support I have come across.
cons: Having too many features to implement quickly!

review_title: If you need support, look elsewhere
description: In short, great app, downright awful support
author: Humberto C.
pros: Very easy to implement. Currently using FreshDesk, FreshCaller and FreshSales. Great integration, everything works quite well.
cons: As long as you do not need help from support, you will be fine. Every time that I have contacted support it has unfortunately been very disappointing. Even the most basic question takes an inordinate amount of time to get a response. Specific issue on FreshSales that really was upsetting is the fact that under the blossom program you get absolutely no reports, zero. In order to get reports, you have to upgrade to the next plan, garden. The cost per user goes from 12 to 25 if you are on the annual plan or 19 to 35 on the monthly. It is really hard to understand why some basic reports were not provided under blossom. Yes, the app is very useable without reports, however, if you are managing a team and want to see data across users, forget about it. You need reports and will have to migrate to the next plan up. I cannot stress the fact that the support is just simply not a priority for them, for many folks this could be the one thing that will force them to look somewhere else.

review_title: A Game-Changer for Sales Teams
author: Ruzan W.
pros: Freshsales offers several features that stand out positively: 1. **User-Friendly Interface**: The platform is intuitive and easy to navigate, making it accessible for users of all skill levels. 2. **Lead Management**: Freshsales provides robust tools for managing leads, including customizable pipelines and automated workflows that streamline the sales process.
cons: Affordable Pricing**: Compared to other CRM solutions, Freshsales often provides a competitive pricing structure, making it a cost-effective choice for many businesses.

review_title: Easy to use product with tier 1 features
author: Sruti S.
pros: Easy to use product with user friendly UI and comprehensive feature package. Very good product for SME and big companies with affordable pricing plans inclusive of all necessary features for sales and inside sales team . Custom fields, pipeline customizations are some of the best features that make the product convenient to use.
cons: Analytics feature needs improvement in terms of sync lag. Some product features seem relevant to retail / ecommerce businesses. We are into IT consulting services, some B2B features seem irrelevant or inadequate.

review_title: It's a great CRM!
description: All-in-All it's a great software to use. I conclude with the fact that freshsales is ever changing and in my 6 months of usage I have seen anticipated improvements appear right before my eyes. It's perfect for users who are looking for a cost effective and flexible solution to customer relations. The kinks in its usage can be ironed out through support and further improvement of the software itself. It's a great CRM!
author: Dominic C.
pros: The BEST part about Freshale's is the endless capability for customizations and integrations. This allows users to create systems of follow up with multiple points of contact to the client. The new future to manage duplicates was a great addition. I also love the capability to attach documents to client files, really comes in handy.
cons: The system is relatively easy to understand however when it comes to usage I find it's very clunky. I can see how the open set up and free customization may overwhelm even experienced users. I would even say that, the coders and web designers at freshsales had more of an influence on this product then the relation management professionals. It sort of like a "Droid" cell phone. The technology in the phone is superior and far more advanced, yet users are not acclimated to the application of it. I would like to make two suggestions to address such. First, I'd like to point out that even though I'm bring this up in the 'con' section, I have NEVER had a problem with Freshsales support team. When in reference to the wieldiness of the software I think that Freshsales could benefit from a hand on approach and a thorough process in training the users. You see if the users understood Freshsales as much as you folks do I'm certain the above 'con' would be null. Second, in relation to the same 'con' described above I believe this can be solved more directly. What I mean by that is creating an internal prioritization based on recent actions, recent stage changes, number of exchanges, lengths of conversation and what ever variables you guys think that can measure and use as info to prioritize leads. Then possibly a dashboard view, displaying these prioritized leads as well as up coming tasks and appointments, metrics on call volume and possible targets or goals.

review_title: Feels like a breath of fresh air
description: I had a great experience and it has made my life easy ever since I started using it.
author: Priya V.
pros: The product is not bloated like most CRMs. It is very user-friendly and it has a left navigation panel that just lets navigating to any page easily and is very user friendly.
cons: Would be great if it can be integrated with more softwares so there are a lot of options for customers.

review_title: Logical CRM
description: Overall, Fresh Sales is a good CRM with good support which was excellent a few years ago.
author: Robert C.
pros: The logical setup and the initial support.
cons: The lack of interest in sorting out some basic features which are essential to our company:1. The rating of leads by using a percentile calculation which is not relevant and the inability to delete previous incorrect ratings.2. Various small issues with functionality

review_title: Legitimately the Worst CRM I've Ever Used
description: Our experiences have been lots of problems, no solutions.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: They always remember to say "thank you for your patience" when telling us our support tickets haven't been resolved yet.
cons: Off the top of my head: The program will randomly delete calendar events, sending cancellations to prospects but not alerting the user. Multiple meetings were missed because of this. It's been 3 months since we reported it and no fix has been offered. Subsequently all the calendaring has to be done manually. The email editor will randomly delete the line ahead when hitting the backspace key or the space behind when hitting the delete key. To make it interesting it will sometimes do nothing when you hit either key. We have a report in the system showing overdue tasks. This report keeps pulling tasks that have actually been deleted from the system. There's no way to clean up the reports because you can't access the deleted tasks they are listing. We just switched credit cards for the account because the previous was expiring. This came at the same time that they've extended us a credit because of all the problems we've had with the system. The result is that the invoice due is less than the minimum charge level on the card ($0.01 due, $0.50 card minimum). As a result they haven't been able to add the card and we keep getting a banner stating access is cut off in 2 days. They've stated this has been fixed but the banner is still there. Those are just a few things... did I mention that if you take notes in the Notes section of a Calendar event the system will randomly forward those to the other party? Found out about that one the hard way...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Look at this, and I promise you, you'll forget about SalesForce
description: Before Fresh sales, my team and I were using SalesForce. It was far too messy, complex, and I had more meetings with my team to try and figure out the details in a month than I've had in a quarter! We decided to take a look at Freshsales when it came out (end of 2016 I believe), mainly because we've been using Fresh Desk for years and wanted to give them a shot. After the demo, it was a no-brainer. Once we got our account, it took me maybe a week to set everything up and we were ready to go. The interface was just so sleek and stripped down of all those unnecessary fields and options. I could see what was happening, when, and finally what to expect (the latter being very important for any sales manager). Overall, it works just so well for us (small family owned business) and we won't be looking to change anytime soon.
author: Peter V.
pros: There's a number of features I like...reporting, email tracking, lead scoring...Sure, some CRMs out there have all these as well, but everything is so darn well packed and easy to use! If I had to choose one, I'd say email tracking. That had helped a lot with follow-ups and our sales funnel in general.
cons: Can't say there is anything I dislike about the software at present time; it did lack certain features upon release, but the current version has everything we need to take our prospect from point A to point C(lose).

review_title: Freshsales is User-Friendly Apps
description: We are very helpful to manage Contacts, Deals and others. Moreover, the Customer Journey feature and also Wofkflow to set up Automation according to our business needs And also we are very helpful to manage our Sales Team well. Because everything is well recorded in Freshsales Suite Enterprise
author: Amirullah H.
pros: The feature we often use is Marketing Automation. And of course Freshsales is very easy to use and the UI/UX display is very attractive.
cons: We think there is a need for integration with several marketplaces other than Shopify Like Shopee, Lazada and Tokopedia Because in Indonesia, there are still many who use the Marketplace

review_title: A good solid CRM product and service
description: A good product with good service back up
author: Sam F.
pros: We use the WhatsApp. marketing on a weekly basis
cons: WHatsApp journey gliches, although this may be a fault with Meta

review_title: Mixed feelings
description: I am actually struggling with use of the system, it lacks basic customization features such as fields for activities.
author: Karol A.
pros: I like the fact, that if offers you some basic features of customization
cons: I hate that when you have custom sales activity you can only have one field set for all of these. Also the scope of access is not so much customizable, of course it offers some basic things but nothing more that that. Also come on, why can't I report those custom sales activities?

review_title: Freshsales for better Sales
description: It has been a good CRM for improving sales
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Email Tracking, Lead Management, Sales sequences
cons: A bit higher on the commercial side than the others.

review_title: Freshsales Review
author: Pauline R.
pros: It is a great first CRM when you are a small company just starting your business and growing your database. I started using it in my previous role in a very small startup and it did the job for a while, the knowledge base management is great and quite intuitive. Would definitely recommend for a small budget and small startup.
cons: Some of the features were very tricky, the layout is not very intuitive and it is quite hard to see all your information. Once again, if you try to scale or actually do forecast/sales pipeline review, I'm not sure it is the best tool

review_title: Best Sales CRM
description: It is helping our business grow and the cost is inexpensive.
author: Sonya G.
pros: The integration was quick and painless. The lead generation and omni channel support is outstanding
cons: We would like to see integrations with AI tools such as ChatGPT
